purpose: Inject mesh-corrected CFD closures (per-corner bend K, de-buoyed per-leg friction) into tamu_loop_model_v2 and quantify 1D predictivity vs CFD for loop mdot and per-segment dP.
scope: Salt 2/3/4 Jin. Model forms: default, CFD closures, zero-minor, zero-major-zero-minor. Salt 1 low-trust caveat.

key_findings.bend_k_issue: Injected corner-K overweight minor loss ~5-8x (local q_ref normalization vs pipe bulk)

tests: 4 passed (test_geometry_refinement, test_launch_predictive_closure_study). All 13 campaign plans load.
note: Numbers at ins=1.0in later found to be condition-dependent (loop 60K too hot vs CFD). Overnight corrections (AGENT-171) appended to report README.
